description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Lung Cheung Road, Kwun Tong bound, near Hammer Hill Road Swimming Pool
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 龍翔道，往觀塘方向，近斧山道游泳池

2024-04-19T22:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency repair , the fast lane of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Hammer Hill Road Swimming Pool is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.
2024-04-19T22:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近斧山道游泳池的快線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。

2024-04-21T08:02:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Hammer Hill Road Swimming Pool which was closed due to watermain emergency works is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-21T08:02:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管緊急維修而封閉的龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近斧山道游泳池的快線現已解封。

2024-04-20T10:38:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Gloucester Road (Central bound) near Hong Kong Police Headquarters is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-20T10:38:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，告士打道(往中環方向)近香港警察總部的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-20T10:46:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Gloucester Road (Central bound) near Hong Kong Police Headquarters which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T10:46:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的告士打道(往中環方向)近香港警察總部的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-20T10:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Sham Tseng Fire Station is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-20T10:50:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門公路(往九龍方向)近深井消防局的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-20T11:02:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Sham Tseng Fire Station are still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic queue on Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) ends at Tuen Mun Road near Hong Kong Garden.   Traffic is congested now.
2024-04-20T11:02:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，屯門公路(往九龍方向)近深井消防局的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在屯門公路(往九龍方向)的車龍龍尾已到屯門公路近豪景花園。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-04-20T11:27:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Sham Tseng Fire Station which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-04-20T11:27:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近深井消防局的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2024-04-20T11:44:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , part of the lanes of Island Eastern Corridor (Chai Wan bound) near North Point Ferry Pier is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-04-20T11:59:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Island Eastern Corridor (Chai Wan bound) near North Point Ferry Pier which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T11:59:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的東區走廊(往柴灣方向)近北角碼頭的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-20T13:17:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Tin Ma Court is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-04-20T13:21:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Stubbs Road (uphill bound) near Stubbs Road Children's Playground is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-20T13:21:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，司徒拔道(往上山方向)近司徒拔道兒童遊樂場的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-20T13:32:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to the inclement weather, the sailing of Tsui Wah Ferry Service (H. K. ) Ltd, Aberdeen/Stanley and Po Toi Island kaito ferry services depart from Po Toi Island at 2:00 pm and 4:00 pm will not stop at Stanley.
2024-04-20T13:32:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於海面風浪較大，翠華船務（香港）有限公司來往香港仔/赤柱-蒲台島街渡渡輪服務的下午2時正及下午4時正由蒲台島開出的班次將不會經停赤柱。

2024-04-20T17:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Island Eastern Corridor (Central bound) near Quarry Bay Park is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-20T17:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，東區走廊(往中環方向)近鰂魚涌公園的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-20T17:06:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Island Eastern Corridor (Central bound) near Quarry Bay Park which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T17:06:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的東區走廊(往中環方向)近鰂魚涌公園的部份行車線現已解封。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail Individual train service will be delayed
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高鐵個別列車服務延遲

2024-04-20T17:59:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland railway authorities, High Speed Rail train G6114 departing from Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Changshanan will be delayed until around 60 mins due to bad weather conditions.
2024-04-20T17:59:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，由香港西九龍開往長沙南的高速鐵路列車車次G6114，將延遲至大約60分鐘開出。

2024-04-20T18:06:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tsing Long Highway (Ting Kau Bridge) (Tuen Mun bound) is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-20T18:06:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，青朗公路(汀九橋)(往屯門方向) 的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-20T18:31:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tsing Long Highway (Ting Kau Bridge) (Tuen Mun bound) which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T18:31:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的青朗公路(汀九橋)(往屯門方向) 的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-20T18:12:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Hammer Hill Road Swimming Pool is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-20T18:12:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近斧山道游泳池的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-20T18:44:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Hammer Hill Road Swimming Pool which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T18:44:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近斧山道游泳池的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-20T19:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2024-04-20T19:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2024-04-20T19:45:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Chatham Road South (Tai Kok Tsui bound) near Princess Margaret Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T19:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的漆咸道南(往大角咀方向)近公主道的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-20T21:20:00.CONTENT_EN: All lanes of Hiram's Highway (Tseung Kwan O bound) near Chuk Kok Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T21:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的西貢公路(往將軍澳方向)近竹角路的全線現已解封。

2024-04-20T21:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to flooding , part of the lanes of Island Eastern Corridor (Chai Wan bound) near North Point Ferry Pier is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-20T21:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水浸，東區走廊(往柴灣方向)近北角碼頭的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-20T22:12:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Island Eastern Corridor (Chai Wan bound) near North Point Ferry Pier which was closed due to flooding is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T22:12:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水浸而封閉的東區走廊(往柴灣方向)近北角碼頭的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-20T21:42:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to flooding , part of the lanes of Tseung Kwan O Tunnel Road (Tseung Kwan O bound) near Po Hong Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-20T21:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水浸，將軍澳隧道公路(往將軍澳方向)近寶康路的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-20T22:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tseung Kwan O Tunnel Road (Tseung Kwan O bound) near Po Hong Road which was closed due to flooding is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-20T22:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水浸而封閉的將軍澳隧道公路(往將軍澳方向)近寶康路的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-21T08:04:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Tai Po Road (Cheung Sha Wan bound) near Shek Kip Mei Street which was closed due to watermain burst is re-opened to all traffic. In addition, the slow lane of Shek Kip Mei Street (Un Chau Street bound) near Tai Po Road is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-21T08:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管爆裂而封閉的大埔道(往長沙灣方向)近石硤尾街的慢線現已解封。此外，石硤尾街(往元州街方向)近大埔道的慢線亦已解封。

2024-04-21T10:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2024-04-21T10:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2024-04-21T10:18:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge, with details as shown below: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge are lowered from 100km/h to 50 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge is lowered from 80km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-04-21T10:18:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋主橋已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： (i)港珠澳大橋主橋的快線及中線車速限制由每小時100公里降至每小時50 公里；及 (ii)港珠澳大橋主橋的慢線車速限制由每小時80公里降至每小時50 公里。

2024-04-21T20:52:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge has resumed 100 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge has resumed 80km/h.
2024-04-21T20:52:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋主橋已實施以下安排： (i)港珠澳大橋主橋的快線及中線車速限制恢復為每小時100公里；及 (ii)港珠澳大橋主橋的慢線車速限制恢復為每小時80公里。

2024-04-21T12:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Island Road (Repulse Bay bound) near Deep Water Bay Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-21T12:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，香島道(往淺水灣方向)近深水灣道的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-21T12:13:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Island Road (Repulse Bay bound) near Deep Water Bay Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-21T12:13:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的香島道(往淺水灣方向)近深水灣道的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-21T12:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to fallen tree , part of the lanes of Wylie Road (both bounds) near Wylie Path is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-21T12:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 因塌樹，衛理道(來回方向)近衛理徑的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-21T12:47:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to fallen tree , Peak Tram service is suspended temporarily.
2024-04-21T12:47:00.CONTENT_CN: 因塌樹，山頂纜車已暫停服務。

2024-04-21T17:41:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to fallen tree , Peak Tram service is still being suspended. At the same time, CTB route no. 15C is temporarily suspended.
2024-04-21T17:41:00.CONTENT_CN: 因塌樹，山頂纜車仍然暫停服務。同時，城巴第15C號線現暫停服務。

2024-04-22T06:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to fallen tree , Peak Tram service is still being suspended. At the same time, CTB route no. 15C is still being suspended, citizens please consider using other public transport services.
2024-04-22T06:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 因塌樹，山頂纜車仍然暫停服務。同時，城巴第15C號線仍然暫停服務，市民請考慮使用其他公共交通服務。

2024-04-21T14:59:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to inclement weather , the following ferry service(s) will be or have been suspended. 
Tsui Wah Ferry Service (H. K. ) Limited
The ferry service departure from Po Toi Island to Stanley's Blake Pier will be canceled and instead be replaced by a service from Po Toi Island to Aberdeen at 3:00 p. m. and 6:00 p. m.
2024-04-21T14:59:00.CONTENT_CN:
因惡劣天氣，以下渡輪服務將會或已經暫停服務。
翠華船務（香港）有限公司
在下午3:00 及下午4:30 由蒲台島開出往赤柱的航班將會取消，並更改為下午3:00 及下午6:00 由蒲台島開出前往香港仔。

2024-04-21T15:32:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to emergency maintenance work at University Station, the total journey time on the East Rail Line between Admiralty Station and Lo Wu Station / Lok Ma Chau Station could be extended by 3-5 minutes. 

For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm
Passengers for Lok Ma Chau Station, please change at Sheung Shui Station. Longer waiting times on East Rail Line platforms can be expected. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-04-21T15:32:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於大學站需進行緊急維修工作，東鐵綫來往金鐘站及羅湖站/落馬洲站的行車時間預計需要額外3-5分鐘。
詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm

前往落馬洲站的乘客，請在上水站轉車。現時東鐵綫月台上的乘客較多，候車時間亦會較長。
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-04-21T16:26:00.CONTENT_EN: The emergency maintenance work at University Station has been completed. Normal train service is gradually resuming on the East Rail Line.
2024-04-21T16:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 在大學站的緊急維修工作已經完成，東鐵綫列車服務逐步回復正常。

description.LOCATION_EN: Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road
description.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋香港連接路

2024-04-21T16:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-04-21T16:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2024-04-21T18:56:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2024-04-21T18:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。

2024-04-21T16:40:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department was informed by MTRCL that some High Speed Rail train services between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Mainland will be delayed due to bad weather conditions. 

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or click the “车站大屏” (only available on Chinese version) on the mobile app, HSR website or mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-04-21T16:40:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，由於天氣情況惡劣，部分來往香港西九龍站及內地的高速鐵路列車服務將會延遲。

有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)或如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁或手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

2024-04-22T00:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tate's Cairn Highway (Tai Po bound) near Sha Tin Sewage Treatment Works is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Extra Travelling Time on the Tsuen Wan Line
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 荃灣綫需額外行車時間

2024-04-23T08:38:00.CONTENT_EN:
As a passenger on a train needs urgent medical assistance, the total journey time on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central Station and Tsuen Wan Station could be extended by 10-15 minutes. 
Please allow more time for travel. MTR Staff are assisting the passenger concerned.
2024-04-23T08:38:00.CONTENT_CN:
荃灣綫列車有乘客需緊急醫療協助，來往中環站和荃灣站的行車時間預計需額外10-15分鐘。 
請為行程預留充裕時間。港鐵職員現正協助有關乘客。

2024-04-23T08:49:00.CONTENT_EN: The case of a passenger on a Tsuen Wan Line train needing medical assistance has been handled. Normal train service is resuming.
2024-04-23T08:49:00.CONTENT_CN: 荃灣綫列車乘客求助的事件已處理，列車服務逐步回復正常。
